name: @maceip/v9-agent-shell-tools
description: Agent shell tools with V9 multi-runtime orchestration

scripts.test:go: go build -o /tmp/mcpmux.bin ./mcpmux && go build -o /tmp/echoserver.bin ./mcpmux/internal/testbin/echoserver && go build -o /tmp/echoserver_v2.bin ./mcpmux/internal/testbin/echoserver_v2 && go build -o /tmp/crashserver.bin ./mcpmux/internal/testbin/crashserver && MCPMUX_TEST_BIN__MAIN_MCPMUX_MCPMUX__MCPMUX=/tmp/mcpmux.bin MCPMUX_TEST_BIN__MAIN_MCPMUX_INTERNAL_TESTBIN_ECHOSERVER_ECHOSERVER__ECHOSERVER=/tmp/echoserver.bin MCPMUX_TEST_BIN__MAIN_MCPMUX_INTERNAL_TESTBIN_ECHOSERVER_V2_ECHOSERVER_V2__ECHOSERVER_V2=/tmp/echoserver_v2.bin MCPMUX_TEST_BIN__MAIN_MCPMUX_INTERNAL_TESTBIN_CRASHSERVER_CRASHSERVER__CRASHSERVER=/tmp/crashserver.bin go test ./grpc_exec/... ./mcpmux/...
